titleStmt.title: SII 29.307: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 307. (A.R. No. B. 553 of 1961-62.) GŌRKAL, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It states that certain uncultivated lands were assigned to people who, in turn, had to remit to the government a stipulated amount of money and quantities of ghee and paddy as tax (details are there). Mentions some officials, of whom mokhāsāyis of Gorkal was one. Dēśa mukhi Bāsha Ma(ḷa)ya Nārappa wrote this record.

The date śaka 1538, Vyaya, Āśvija ba. 7. Monday given here is irregular. The cyclic year Vyaya occurred in śaka 1508. The existing cyclic year in Śaka 1538 was Naḷa. The probable date seems to be 1586 A.D., September 25, [Sunday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śālivāhana śaka 1538
vyayanāma saṁvatsarada Āśvīja ba . 7
sōmavāra śubha (na)kṣatradalli gōrakalla
mokhāsāyigaḷu khā . nujāatakhāna sā
hēbara kārakirdi khā . na(va)ratukhāna sāhēbāha
maladāraru ma . majakūra gavaḍa mallaṁṇagavata kulaka
raṇi (na) mēṭigavuḍa bāra balavata muṁttādavarige sāsavahā
ki koṭa kavuluvūra holagaḷa sahaṁtava baḷasa biṭuyiralāgi yivake
dina holagaḷige maḍike kaṭikidita māḍalike mūruvaruṣa kavulu daral 1
(va) kaḷa vaṁdake modalu varuṣa vakaḷa l 1 bhatta ll 2 tuppa yeraḍane varaṣa A
demariyāde mūrane varuṣa Ade mariyādeyalu tupa bhatta koḍabēku nālku va
ruṣa modalāgi sālābādudara l 1 ke Ayidu varuṣa 95 bhatta 818 (kka)ḷa tupayaraḍu
sēru 2 mariyāde kirdi kavulu koṭṭarevoṁdu bīḷu vokkalaraḷu kirdi māmūli Ā
thāvu yeraḍu rācūra vilāyiti dēśamukhi nānākagavuḍa dēśukulkararṇinārō bōpayama
rika nārapanu vūragavuḍaru kulkūjabigaḷu muṁttāda samasta prajegaḷu biṁnāha māḍalā
gi manasige taṁdu bāḷubida holagaḷu kirdi māmūli Āgabēkeṁdu nadarahu mariyādeyalu
kavulu koḷu yidhevu sukhadalu naṁma kavulu naṁbi kirdi māmūli māḍikoṁḍu kavulu . (śrī) yā
ṇisadaru hola bhatta tupa rokka tetu koṁ
ḍu bīḷu holagaḷa kirdi māḍikoṁḍu paraṁpareli sukha
dalu vakala tanava māḍikoṁḍu yihudu rūyeṁdu taṁma sukṛta sākṣiyāgi
barsa sāsana hāksi koṭakavulu yidadārā(ga)le tetu bāradu divāṇadāru baṁda
re yiṁdhe kavulu naḍesabēku naḍasade tappidare turukarādare musānara Āṇe brā
hmarādare gōhatye māḍida hāṁge katti tuṁṇe kalupu kavulu tappidavarige ma
re māḍikoḷadavarige yikavulu naṁbi māḍadavarige yida kaṇiyēdu
kovulu sahiya sāsana baradāta dēśamukhi bā(ṣa) ma(ḷa)ya . nārappa .
Digital edition of SII 29.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
